text: Time management prioritizes tasks for maximum effectiveness. Eisenhower Matrix: urgent/important quadrants — do important before urgent. Pareto Principle: 80% of results from 20% of effort. Time blocking: schedule deep work sessions. Parkinson's Law: work expands to fill available time — set deadlines.
Covey's 7 Habits: Be proactive, Begin with end in mind, First things first, Think win-win, Seek first to understand, Synergize, Sharpen the saw.
Deep work (Cal Newport): 90-minute focused blocks — 4 hours deep work can exceed 12 hours shallow work.
